Background.occupation: Mid-level Project Manager at a logistics firm
Background.key_experience: Being passed over for a senior promotion in favor of a younger colleague whom he perceived as less competent, fueling a permanent resentment toward corporate hierarchy and 'undeserved' success.

Current_State.recent_memory: The barista at the local cafe ran out of oat milk and gave a shrug that felt like a personal insult, prompting an immediate one-star Yelp review before the coffee was even served.
